name: WIFCOIN_ETH
report: Double claimEarned: Each time the claimEarned function is called, the code iterates through all the stakes and accumulates the calculated _earned amount. However, after calculating the rewards, the already calculated rewards are not marked as claimed. As a result, the next time claimEarned is called, it will recalculate those already claimed rewards, allowing users to claim rewards multiple times.
